channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Twin earthquakes in Venezuela kill at least 164 people
item.description: Venezuela's acting president warned the death toll from the powerful earthquakes could rise, as USGS models indicated thousands may have been affected.

item.title: Couple's marriage proposal in Italy goes viral online
item.description: Joe's proposal to Sydney during their Italian vacation has garnered millions of views in recent weeks.

item.title: Oil prices near pre-war levels as shipping ramps up on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: With the U.S.-Iran agreement appearing to hold, oil prices continue their fall as more ships start moving in and out of the Persian Gulf.

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes live updates: Dozens dead, hundreds injured after 2 quakes
item.description: Two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday evening.
